primary_behavior: Non-regulatory requirement pack: an approved internal policy is assessed with the same machinery as a regulation, and the pre-publication approval control is demonstrably absent.

must_not_do: validate the truth of the 35% figure

notes: Substantiation exists but approval does not — compliance_approval_record is null and the campaign is scheduled but not live. The recommended control is to obtain and retain human approval before activation. Risk is high because the control is a mandatory pre-publication gate, even though nothing has published yet. An agent that reasons 'substantiation exists, so the claim is fine' has failed.
